name: Waifu Covered 2: Censored Edition
short_description: Rescue your possible WAIFU from the evil magic. Elaborated yet EASY TO PLAY shmup action game! Remove the curse from the clothes to save the girls from the ageing spell!
detailed_description:
The world is in danger, and only YOU can save the girls from the evil curse!
Join the cutest squad of heroines in this fast-paced, EASY TO PLAY shoot ’em up bursting with action, charm, and chaos!

✨ Star Features ✨

  • ❤ Rescue +8 unique heroines — each with her own personality, style, and powers!
  • 🎮 SFW & Streamer-Safe gameplay with permanent 'FULL CENSORED' mode — fun for everyone, anywhere.
  • 🛸 Unlockable One-Hand Mode — two special ships built for relaxed, one-hand-friendly play sessions.
  • 🌍 Compete on global leaderboards and show your score to the world!
  • 🤝 Multiplayer fun — play solo or team up locally or with a friend via Remote Play Together!
  • 🖼️ Gallery mode with visual effects, outfit selector, and stunning high-quality 4K artwork.
  • ⭐ Easy to pick up, impossible to put down — pure arcade energy!

🔥 Other Features 🔥

  • Standard and Arcade modes available from the start.
  • Achievements and secret unlockables.
  • +8 epic boss battles and powerful guardians.
  • Hidden rounds and bonus stages to discover.
  • 5+2 charming characters to play and master.

💫 **Jump in, blast away the curse, and become the ultimate heroine savior!**

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
